plan.title: Prefect/MLflow Code Review Findings — 15-Task Cleanup Plan
plan.description: Systematic cleanup of 15 recurring code quality issues found during PR #400 review. Groups: DRY violations (MLflow init duplicated in 6 flows), inconsistent naming (env vars, flow names), and silent exception swallowing.

task.title: Centralize EXPERIMENT_* and FLOW_NAME_* constants
task.description: All MLflow experiment names and Prefect flow names are scattered as magic strings across 6+ flow files. Extract to orchestration/constants.py.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_constants.py: verify EXPERIMENT_* and FLOW_NAME_* constants exist, are non-empty strings, flow names use lowercase-hyphen convention
tdd_spec.green: src/minivess/orchestration/constants.py with 8 EXPERIMENT_* and 9 FLOW_NAME_* constants

task.title: Extract find_upstream_safely() and log_completion_safe() helpers
task.description: FlowContract boilerplate (6-line try-except wrapper) repeated in every flow. Extract to mlflow_helpers.py with proper exception isolation.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_mlflow_helpers.py: 6 tests covering success path, exception isolation, None run_id guard

task.title: Standardize @flow(name=...) to lowercase-hyphen convention
task.description: Some flows use "Post-Training Pipeline", "Deploy Pipeline" etc. instead of Prefect's expected lowercase-hyphen convention.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_flow_names.py: AST scan verifying all @flow(name=...) values match FLOW_NAME_* constants
tdd_spec.green: Fix flow names in post_training_flow.py, deploy_flow.py, data_flow.py, dashboard_flow.py

task.title: Standardize output env var naming to _OUTPUT_DIR suffix
task.description: ANALYSIS_OUTPUT and DASHBOARD_OUTPUT must become ANALYSIS_OUTPUT_DIR and DASHBOARD_OUTPUT_DIR for consistency with other env vars.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_env_var_naming.py: AST scan verifying all OUTPUT env vars end with _OUTPUT_DIR

task.title: Align MLflow flow_name tags with @flow decorator names
task.description: flow_name tags written to mlflow.start_run() don't match @flow(name=...) values. FlowContract.find_upstream_run() searches by tag.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_flow_name_tags.py: AST scan verifying flow_name tag values match @flow decorator names

task.title: Replace dict return with PostTrainingFlowResult dataclass
task.description: post_training_flow() returns plain dict. Replace with typed dataclass for consistency with TrainingFlowResult and DeployResult.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_post_training_result.py: verify return type annotation and field types
tdd_spec.green: Add PostTrainingFlowResult dataclass to post_training_flow.py, update return statements

task.title: Make deploy_flow config parameter optional with from_env() factory
task.description: deploy_flow(config=...) requires explicit config. Add from_env() classmethod to DeployConfig and make config parameter optional.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_deploy_flow_config.py: verify from_env() raises RuntimeError when MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI missing
tdd_spec.green: Add DeployConfig.from_env() classmethod; update deploy_flow signature

task.title: Move FlowContract imports from try-except to module top-level
task.description: FlowContract is imported inside try-except blocks in 5 flow files (×2 each). Violates "imports at module level" convention and prevents proper IDE analysis.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_flow_contract_dedup.py: AST scan detecting FlowContract ImportFrom nodes inside ast.Try nodes
tdd_spec.green: Replace inline FlowContract usage with find_upstream_safely() and log_completion_safe() in all 5 flow files

task.title: Adopt log_completion_safe() in all flows
task.description: Replace inline log_flow_completion try-except with log_completion_safe() helper. Implemented as part of T-03.

task.title: Eliminate adjacent try-except blocks
task.description: After T-03/T-04, each flow function has at most one try-except block. Implemented as part of T-03.

task.title: Replace sentinel "no_upstream" strings with None
task.description: upstream_*_run_id: str = "no_upstream" sentinel strings violate Never-Silent-Fail rule. Replace with str | None = None.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_no_sentinels.py: AST scan for "no_upstream" string constants in flow files
tdd_spec.green: Replace in train_flow.py, post_training_flow.py, analysis_flow.py, deploy_flow.py

task.title: Expose ONNX export failures in DeployResult
task.description: ONNX export failures silently swallowed in deploy_flow. Add failed_operations field to DeployResult; capture all failures.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_onnx_failure_propagation.py: verify DeployResult has failed_operations field; PostTrainingFlowResult already has it
tdd_spec.green: Add failed_operations: list[str] to DeployResult; populate on ONNX export exception

task.title: Add preflight env var validation to training and analysis flows
task.description: Training and analysis flows fail cryptically mid-run when SPLITS_DIR, CHECKPOINT_DIR, or ANALYSIS_OUTPUT_DIR are missing. Add explicit validation at flow start.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_preflight_validation.py: 6 tests covering missing/present env vars for both flows
tdd_spec.green: Add _validate_training_env() and _validate_analysis_env() with RuntimeError + actionable instructions; call at flow start

task.title: Add explicit upstream run ID params for deterministic chaining
task.description: Flows auto-discover upstream runs via MLflow tag queries. Fragile when tags are missing. Add optional upstream_X_run_id params that bypass auto-discovery when provided.

tdd_spec.red: tests/unit/orchestration/test_explicit_upstream_params.py: 8 tests verifying param presence and None default for all 4 consumer flows
tdd_spec.green: Add upstream_data_run_id to training_flow, upstream_training_run_id to post_training_flow and run_analysis_flow, upstream_analysis_run_id to deploy_flow

task.title: Save XML plan to disk and close parent issue
task.description: Rule #15 compliance: write this plan file to disk at the path specified in issue #404. Close parent issue after all 15 sub-issues are done.

tdd_spec.red: All 47 unit tests in tests/unit/orchestration/ passing
